CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-23-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-25-2014 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-20-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Quash Subpoenas Of Employment Records
Off Calendar Jul-18-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: alan cohen, esq., 415.984.1943, for plaintiff bonnie lau.
joanna sattler, esq., 310.312.4312, for defendant deloite tax llp.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: PLAINTIFF BONNIE LAU's Motion To Quash Subpoenas Of Employment Records is Denied. Plaintiff's employment records from four prior employers are discoverable as Plaintiff has waived her right to privacy by bringing this employment action against Defendant. Further, these records are relevant to establishing Plaintiff's ability to mitigate her loss from employment termination. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Notice Of Motion To Quash Subpoenas Of Employment Records
Off Calendar Jun-27-2013 Continued To Jul-18-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Alan F. Cohen, 415.984.1943, appearing for the Plaintiff;
Andrew Satenberg, Manatt Phelps & Phillips, 310.312.4263, appearing for the Defendant.

No stipulation to the Judge Pro Tem by Plaintiff. Plaintiff BONNIE LAU'S Motion to Quash Subpoenas of Employment Records is continued to July 18, 2013 at 9:30 am in Department 302. Judge Pro Tem: Adrian Colley, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Not Reported. =(302/JPT)
